role: A monolithic shared CSS sheet that defines the product chrome, phone/screen shells, and data-driven archetype layouts (unit view, piece, decision card, generic archetype) for gallery surfaces.
capabilities: Phone-sized device chrome (.phone variants, status bar, home-bar hatch)
Standalone 390×844 screen shell (.screen) scaling the same components
Product header, prose, stat band, ledger rows, plates/insets, primary/secondary actions
Glass rail, frosted cards, hotspot dots, filter pills, unit caption, joint connector
Unit-view immersive layout with radial background, frosted words, glass chips, and V-hub radial menu
Piece-in-focus archetype with preview, pins, takes, and slider dials
Decision-card layout with option buttons, recommendation/decided states, error banner, and Ask button
Generic archetype renderer (.ar-*) with responsive zones, streaming cursor, and ink-chevron options
CSS-driven motion: open/close transitions, fired confirmation flash, blinking streaming cursor, reduced-motion guard
substance_why: The file implements a broad, token-bound visual system with concrete classes for shells, chrome, and multiple archetypes, plus animations and responsive rules.
interactions_present: Hover/focus-visible/active states on buttons and options
Class-driven open/close animations for the unit-view V-hub wheel (.uv-vee.open, .screen.uv.vee-open)
Streaming-cursor blink animation for pending explanation text
Reduced-motion media query disabling the streaming cursor blink
interactions_missing: No JavaScript event handlers or state machine for the V-hub, decision options, or piece dials
No ARIA roles, labels, or keyboard navigation for the radial menu or decision cards
No actual tap/click-to-select wiring beyond CSS cursor states
No loading, skeleton, or error retry interactions
No dark-mode, high-contrast, or touch-specific interaction variants
No focus-trap or scroll-lock behavior for overlays
performance_risks: Heavy use of backdrop-filter:blur across many stacked absolute elements
Multiple large radial gradients and repeating-linear-gradient patterns
Many layered box-shadows and text-shadows on small elements
Frequent color-mix() calls and CSS variable resolution in hot paths
Animations and transitions without will-change hints on complex composited layers
Deep absolute-position stacking contexts that may cause repaint/reflow churn on state changes
reuse_why: The token-driven component vocabulary and archetype layouts are worth preserving, but the file is too monolithic and mixes chrome, screens, archetypes, and motion in one place.
decomposition_hints: Split phone chrome (.phone, .sbar, .p-hd, .p-act, .p-rail, .p-hatch) into its own module
Split screen shell and responsive scaling (.screen, .screen.* overrides) into a screen module
Split unit-view immersive components (.uv-*) into a dedicated archetype module
Split piece-in-focus components (.screen.piece) into a dedicated archetype module
Split decision-card components (.dc-*, .brain-ask) into a dedicated archetype module
Split generic archetype components (.ar-*, .dc-q, .dc-explain) into a dedicated archetype module
Split keyframes and motion utilities (uvScrim, uvFired, rh-blink) into a motion/tokens module
